source.definition: a supernatural divine being worshiped in many religions

explanation.sourceText: The English word "God" originates from the Old English "god" and refers to a divine being or supreme power. It is related to other Indo-European language roots.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „God” provine din vechea engleză „god” și se referă la o ființă divină sau putere supremă. Este înrudit cu alte rădăcini din limbile indo-europene.

source.additional: In various cultures, God is interpreted and referred to differently.

target.definition: o entitate supranaturală, divină, die in vielen Religionen verehrt wird

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word "Dumnezeu" comes from the Church Slavonic expression "dě̌mǔ bogŭ" (Lord God), a compound of "dominu" (lord) and "zeu/bog" (god).
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „Dumnezeu” provine din slavona bisericească „dě̌mǔ bogŭ” (Domnul Dumnezeu), compus din „dominu” (domn) și „zeu/bog” (zeu, dumnezeu).

target.additional: Dumnezeu este venerat în diferite religii ca creator al universului.

explanation.sourceText: The term describes the divine presence.

examples.sourceText: The divine is within each of us.
examples.targetText: Divinitatea este în fiecare dintre noi.

explanation.sourceText: God is also referred to as the creator of the world.
God is often associated with love.
explanation.targetText: Dumnezeu este adesea asociat cu iubirea.

explanation.sourceText: Refers to God in the role of the Father.
explanation.targetText: Se referă la Dumnezeu ca Tată Ceresc.

examples.sourceText: The heavenly Father loves all people.
Many cultures believe in one God.
Talking about God can bring people together.
examples.targetText: Discuția despre Dumnezeu poate uni oamenii.

examples.sourceText: God is a source of strength for many people.
examples.targetText: Dumnezeu este pentru mulți oameni o sursă de putere.

learningTips.text: Think of 'Dumnezeu' as the Romanian word for God, the supreme being in many religions.
Remember 'Dumnezeu' by associating it with 'dominus' meaning lord, reflecting its origin.
Visualize a powerful, loving presence when you hear 'Dumnezeu' to help recall its meaning.
Connect 'Dumnezeu' with prayers and spiritual rituals common in Romanian culture.
